text.title: Edge-Case Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Edge-Case Checklist end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: fetch-component
step.action: Open the design in Figma; export the 10 case prompts.

step.name: answer-each-case
step.action: Mark each case YES / NO / N/A with one-line note.

step.name: audit-na-reasons
step.action: Every N/A has a reason; otherwise reject.

step.name: decide-handoff-status
step.action: Any NO → handoff blocked until fixed or debt accepted in decision log.

step.name: store-and-route
step.action: Run validator; commit; attach to handoff package.
